appStore.title: Phonics Flashcards
appStore.description:
A simple to use and completely customizable deck of over 100 flashcards covering both introductory and advanced phonemes. Also includes fun phonics games. Designed for classroom or home use.

FEATURES
• Appropriate for Students of Any Grade or Fluency Level
• Over 100 Flashcards Covering the Basics and Advanced Concepts
• Choose Deck Categories or Customize Your Deck for Your Lessons 
• Read Aloud Option
• Help a cute robot sort the vowels in the Phonics Factory game!

VOWELS
• Short and Long Vowels
• R Controlled Vowels
• Schwa
• Differences of ü and ū
• Silent e
• Digraphs
• Diphthongs

CONSONANTS
• Blends
• Digraphs
• Double Letter Digraphs

OTHER
• The Sounds of y
